title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXIX. Natural History.
content:
Little cock robin peep'd out of his cabin,
        To see the cold winter come in,
                Tit, for tat, what matter for that,
                He'll hide his head under his wing!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXIX. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
